title: Weapon
description: Data definition for a weapon usable in combat.

material_id.description: Reference to data/materials/<id>.json. Provides density (mass scaling) and edge_retention.

quality.description: Crafting quality. Multiplies effective momentum: poor=×0.80, standard=×1.0, fine=×1.20, masterwork=×1.50 and +5% hit chance.

striking_mass_kg.description: Mass of the striking head or blade edge in kg. Combined with velocity_class to produce momentum. E.g. dagger blade ~0.12, sword blade ~0.40, axe head ~0.55, club head ~0.90.

contact_area_cm2.description: Striking surface area in cm². Small area = concentrated pressure (dagger point ~0.05, sword edge ~0.30). Large area = spread force (club face ~12, fist ~8). pressure = momentum / contact_area_cm2.

velocity_class.description: Speed of attack delivery. Maps to velocity factor in resolver: slow=15, medium=25, fast=35, very_fast=50. momentum = striking_mass_kg × velocity_factor.

swing_momentum.description: LEGACY: optional override. If present, bypasses striking_mass_kg × velocity_class calculation.

thrust_momentum.description: LEGACY: optional override for thrusting attacks.

reach_class.description: Melee reach in tiles: unarmed=0, short=1, medium=1, long=2, polearm=2. Polearm also denies adjacent attack bonus.

damage_type.description: Determines which armor material resistances apply.

swing_momentum.description: Base damage value when delivering a swinging attack.

thrust_momentum.description: Base damage value when delivering a thrusting attack.

attack_speed.description: Attacks per WEGO turn. Values > 1.0 allow multiple strikes per turn.

min_skill.description: Minimum melee skill level to use without a penalty.

two_handed.description: If true, occupies both hand slots.
